info.title: BuildWorkPro API
info.description: Construction project management, CRM, and workflows — public REST API.

ErrorCode.description: Catalog of error codes returned by the API

cursor.description: Opaque cursor for the next page; null when no more results

has_more.description: Whether more pages are available after this one

sub.description: Stringified user id of the resource owner.

tenant_id.description: Tenant the access token is scoped to.

email.description: Email address of the resource owner.

name.description: `firstName lastName`, trimmed. Empty string when both names are missing — never null.

role.description: The user's tenant role at the moment the request was authenticated.

scopes.description: The scopes carried by the presented access token.

grant_type.description: OAuth 2.1 grant type. Supported: authorization_code, refresh_token.

redirect_uri.description: Must exact-match the redirect_uri originally used to obtain the code.

client_id.description: OAuth client identifier issued by the registration endpoint.

client_secret.description: Required for confidential clients; MUST be omitted for public clients.

scope.description: Optional space-separated scope list. For grant_type=refresh_token, MUST be a subset of the original refresh token's scopes (scope downgrade only). Upgrade is rejected with invalid_scope.

token.description: The token to revoke. Can be either an access token (prefix bwp_at_) or a refresh token (prefix bwp_rt_).

token_type_hint.description: Optional hint about the token type. The server still falls back to the other type if the hinted lookup misses (RFC 7009 §4.1.2).

client_id.description: OAuth client identifier issued by the registration endpoint.

client_secret.description: Required for confidential clients; MUST be omitted for public clients.

apiKey.description: Long-lived tenant-wide API key. Provision in Settings → Developer → API Keys.

oauth2.description: OAuth 2.1 per-user token. Available in Phase 4.

get.description: Returns a cursor-paginated list of contacts for the authenticated tenant.

post.description: Creates a new contact.

get.description: Returns a single contact.

post.description: Enqueues a CSV export job for contacts. Poll /api/v1/jobs/{id} for status; GET /api/v1/jobs/{id}/download for the signed URL.
Enqueues a CSV import job. sourcePath must be an r2:// path from POST /jobs/uploads.
Enqueues a bulk delete/restore job for up to 500 contact ids.

get.description: Returns a cursor-paginated list of leads for the authenticated tenant.

post.description: Creates a new lead.

get.description: Returns a single lead.

post.description: Promotes a lead to a project. Rejects with 409 if the lead is already in the Won stage.
Enqueues a CSV export job for leads. Poll /api/v1/jobs/{id} for status; GET /api/v1/jobs/{id}/download for the signed URL.
Enqueues a CSV import job. sourcePath must be an r2:// path from POST /jobs/uploads.
Enqueues a bulk delete/restore job for up to 500 lead ids.

get.description: Returns a cursor-paginated list of projects for the authenticated tenant.

post.description: Creates a new project.

get.description: Returns a single project.

post.description: Enqueues a CSV export job for projects. Poll /api/v1/jobs/{id} for status; GET /api/v1/jobs/{id}/download for the signed URL.
Enqueues a CSV import job. sourcePath must be an r2:// path from POST /jobs/uploads.
Enqueues a bulk delete/restore job for up to 500 project ids.

get.description: Returns a cursor-paginated list of bids for the authenticated tenant.

post.description: Creates a new bid in draft status.

get.description: Returns a single bid.

patch.description: Partially updates a bid. Accepted bids are locked.

delete.description: Soft-deletes a bid. Accepted bids are locked.

post.summary: Send a bid to the customer
post.description: Transitions a draft bid to sent and emails the customer.
Marks a sent bid as accepted.
Creates a new draft bid copied from the given bid.
Enqueues a CSV export job for bids. Poll /api/v1/jobs/{id} for status; GET /api/v1/jobs/{id}/download for the signed URL.
Enqueues a bulk delete/restore job for up to 500 bid ids.
Enqueues an async PDF generation job. Poll /api/v1/jobs/{id} for status; GET /api/v1/jobs/{id}/download for the signed URL.

get.description: Returns a cursor-paginated list of pay apps for the authenticated tenant.

post.summary: Mark approved pay app as paid
Start CSV export of pay applications
post.description: Enqueues a CSV export job for pay apps. Poll /api/v1/jobs/{id} for status; GET /api/v1/jobs/{id}/download for the signed URL.

post.summary: Start bulk operation on pay applications
post.description: Enqueues a bulk delete/restore job for up to 500 pay app ids.

post.summary: Generate PDF for a pay application (async)
post.description: Enqueues an async PDF generation job. Poll /api/v1/jobs/{id} for status; GET /api/v1/jobs/{id}/download for the signed URL.

get.description: Returns a cursor-paginated list of change orders.

post.summary: Start CSV export of change orders
post.description: Enqueues a CSV export job for change orders. Poll /api/v1/jobs/{id} for status; GET /api/v1/jobs/{id}/download for the signed URL.

post.summary: Start bulk operation on change orders
post.description: Enqueues a bulk delete/restore job for up to 500 change order ids.

post.summary: Generate PDF for a change order (async)
post.description: Enqueues an async PDF generation job. Poll /api/v1/jobs/{id} for status; GET /api/v1/jobs/{id}/download for the signed URL.

get.description: Returns a cursor-paginated list of site logs.

post.summary: Start CSV export of site logs
post.description: Enqueues a CSV export job for site logs. Poll /api/v1/jobs/{id} for status; GET /api/v1/jobs/{id}/download for the signed URL.

post.summary: Start bulk operation on site logs
post.description: Enqueues a bulk delete/restore job for up to 500 site log ids.

get.description: Returns a cursor-paginated list of time entries.

post.summary: Start CSV export of time entries
post.description: Enqueues a CSV export job for time entries. Poll /api/v1/jobs/{id} for status; GET /api/v1/jobs/{id}/download for the signed URL.

post.summary: Start bulk operation on time entries
post.description: Enqueues a bulk delete/restore job for up to 500 time entry ids.

get.description: Returns a cursor-paginated list of products.

post.description: Enqueues a CSV export job for products. Poll /api/v1/jobs/{id} for status; GET /api/v1/jobs/{id}/download for the signed URL.
Enqueues a CSV import job. sourcePath must be an r2:// path from POST /jobs/uploads.
Enqueues a bulk delete/restore job for up to 500 product ids.

get.description: Returns a cursor-paginated list of document metadata (not the file bytes).
Streams the file bytes with appropriate Content-Type / Content-Disposition.

post.description: Enqueues a CSV export job for documents. Poll /api/v1/jobs/{id} for status; GET /api/v1/jobs/{id}/download for the signed URL.
Enqueues a bulk delete/restore job for up to 500 document ids.

get.description: Returns a list of calendar events within the given time window. Aggregates projects, tasks, phases, leads, bids and activities. Max window 366 days.
Returns a cursor-paginated list of tenant team members (name, email, role).
Returns a cursor-paginated list of project templates.
Returns the tenant's branding (excludes logo bytes — download via internal app).
Returns a cursor-paginated list of async jobs initiated by the authenticated tenant.
Returns a single async job (status, progress, result, error message).

delete.description: Soft-deletes the job row. Artifacts in R2 will be reaped on TTL expiry.

get.description: Redirects (302) to a short-lived pre-signed URL for the result artifact (succeeded/partial jobs only).

409.description: Job not in a downloadable state

get.description: Redirects (302) to a short-lived pre-signed URL for the row-level errors CSV (partial/failed jobs only).

404.description: Not found or no errors artifact

post.description: Cancels a queued or running job. Already-terminal jobs return 409.

post.summary: Get signed URL for CSV upload
post.description: Returns a short-lived R2 signed PUT URL. Caller uploads the CSV bytes directly to R2, then passes the returned sourcePath to POST /{module}/imports.

get.description: Returns all active webhook endpoints for the tenant (capped at 200, no cursor pagination yet). The signingSecret field is never returned here — it is only surfaced once on creation and once on rotation.

post.description: Creates a new webhook endpoint. The url is SSRF-validated before creation. The signingSecret is returned in the response exactly once — store it now, it cannot be retrieved later.

get.description: Returns a single webhook endpoint. The signingSecret field is redacted.

patch.description: Partially updates a webhook endpoint. If url changes, it is re-validated against SSRF rules. The signingSecret is never returned.

delete.description: Soft-deletes a webhook endpoint. Future events will not be delivered.

post.description: Generates a new signing secret for the endpoint and returns it in the response. The old secret is invalidated immediately. Surface this value once and store it securely.

get.summary: List recent deliveries for an endpoint
get.description: Returns up to 100 most recent webhook delivery rows for the endpoint, ordered most-recent-first.
Returns a single webhook delivery row, including the response body (capped at 10KB) and headers captured from the most recent attempt.

post.description: Re-enqueues the delivery for another delivery attempt. The attemptCount is reset to 0, status is set back to pending, and the response/error fields are cleared. Returns 409 if the linked endpoint has been soft-deleted.

get.description: Renders an HTML consent screen. The user must be authenticated via the first-party session cookie. On approval the user is redirected to redirect_uri with `?code=&state=`. On error in the validation phase, fatal errors render an HTML error page (no redirect); validation errors after redirect_uri verification redirect with `?error=&state=`.

302.description: Redirect to client redirect_uri with code or error

post.description: Receives the user's Approve/Deny decision from the consent form. Body is form-encoded with `request_uri` (the original GET URL) and `decision` (approve or deny). Always redirects back to the client's redirect_uri.

Exchanges an authorization code (with PKCE verifier) or a refresh token for a new access token (and rotated refresh token). Body MUST be application/x-www-form-urlencoded per RFC 6749. Response carries Cache-Control: no-store. Confidential clients authenticate by passing client_secret in the body; public clients omit it. Refresh token reuse triggers family-wide revocation of all access + refresh tokens issued from the original grant.

400.description: RFC 6749 §5.2 error envelope (invalid_request, invalid_grant, invalid_client, unsupported_grant_type)

post.description: Revokes an access token or refresh token. Body MUST be application/x-www-form-urlencoded. Per RFC 7009 §2.2, the response is 200 OK whether the token was successfully revoked, already revoked, expired, or unknown — this prevents leaking information about token validity. Revoking a refresh token cascades to the entire token family (all access + refresh tokens issued from the same grant). Revoking an access token does NOT cascade.

200.description: Token revoked, already revoked, expired, or unknown — all return 200 per RFC 7009 §2.2

get.description: Returns identity information about the resource owner authenticated by the presented access token. Authentication is the standard `Authorization: Bearer` header — both API keys (bwp_live_/bwp_test_) and OAuth access tokens (bwp_at_) are accepted. No scope is required to call this endpoint.

200.description: Identity claims for the resource owner

401.description: Authentication missing, invalid, expired, or membership revoked

post.description: Self-registers a new OAuth client. Public endpoint — no authentication required. Per-IP rate-limited to 5 requests/minute. Each redirect_uri is validated against the SSRF guard.
